title: Era lui, sì, sì!
director: Marino Girolami, Marcello Marchesi, Vittorio Metz
actors: Walter Chiari, Isa Barzizza, Carlo Campanini
plot: Fernando, owner of a large chain store, suffers from worrying dreams: he seems to successfully court saucy women, but just as he is about to win them over, a youngster comes on the scene and steals them from under his nose. One da...
